name: Tofu Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, whip the tofu until smooth.
2. Heat the Fruitsource in the microwave for 90 seconds on medium-high power.
3. Pour the heated Fruitsource over the cocoa powder and stir until smooth.
4. Add the vanilla extract.
5. Mix the chocolate mixture into the tofu and continue blending for an additional minute.
6. Pour the mixture into a pre-made pie shell or custard cups.
7. Chill for 1-2 hours.
8. Garnish with banana slices.
(makes 10 servings) (per serving - filling only: 97 calories, 5.5g protein, 16g carbohydrates, 1g fat, 62mg sodium, 24mg calcium, 0 cholesterol)
